underlying_goal: Save the insights report to the project and apply relevant recommendations from it to the tensorflowccp project configuration
friction_detail: Claude initially started reading files instead of moving the report, prompting the user to interrupt and clarify they wanted it moved to the project's docs folder.
brief_summary: User wanted to archive their insights report and apply its recommendations to the project; Claude moved the report to docs, added permissions to settings.json, and configured a PostToolUse test hook successfully.
